summary: Plan and build a Free Fire Max tournament app.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Esports tournament shield logo with subtle flame motif, dark background friendly (ffm-tournament-logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Wide hero banner with abstract esports arena lighting, warm accent colors (ffm-hero-banner.dim_1600x600.png)

existing_features.title: Create the core app navigation and page structure for a Free Fire Max Tournament App with these primary sections: Home (upcoming tournaments), Tournaments (browse/search), Tournament Details, Create Tournament (admin/organizer), My Registrations, and Profile.
Implement Internet Identity sign-in and a signed-in user experience (showing the user as authenticated, and gating organizer/admin actions like creating/editing tournaments behind authentication).

Implement tournament registration flows for players/teams: allow an authenticated user to register, capture in-game name (IGN), optional team name, and squad member IGNs (up to the tournament’s team size), and allow the user to view/cancel their registration when registration is open.

Add match/bracket management for organizers: ability to create match rounds (at least manual round creation), assign registered teams/players into matches, record match results (placement/points or winner), and display a read-only bracket/round view for participants.

Provide an organizer/admin dashboard for managing a tournament: edit tournament info, open/close registrations, lock the bracket, and publish announcements (text updates) shown on the Tournament Details page.
Apply a coherent, distinctive visual theme across the app (colors, typography, spacing, and components) suitable for an esports tournament experience, avoiding blue/purple as primary brand colors.

Generate and include required static images as frontend assets and use them in the UI (header/hero and basic branding). Store them under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them directly from the frontend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a Free Fire Max Tournament App (core tournament app functionality to be defined).

Implement backend data models and persistence for tournaments, including: tournament name, description, rules, region, start date/time, registration open/close date/time, max slots (teams/squads), entry type (solo/duo/squad/custom), prize details (text), organizer principal, and tournament status (draft/open/locked/started/completed/cancelled).
